basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi – Project Nurse, DEO and More – 3 Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Project Nurse, DEO and More Posts. Candidates with 12th-pass Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Delhi official website aiims.edu.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Project Nurse III, Max 30 years for Senior Project Assistant and Data Entry Operator.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Nurse, DEO and More Posts
